initial_candidates.sql:
WITH monthly_sales_2019_2020 AS (
    SELECT 
        times.calendar_year,
        times.calendar_month_number,
        SUM(sales.amount_sold * currency.to_us) AS usd_sales
    FROM sales
    JOIN times ON sales.time_id = times.time_id
    JOIN customers ON sales.cust_id = customers.cust_id
    JOIN countries ON customers.country_id = countries.country_id
    JOIN currency ON times.calendar_year = currency.year 
                   AND times.calendar_month_number = currency.month 
                   AND countries.country_name = currency.country
    WHERE countries.country_name = 'France'
      AND times.calendar_year IN (2019, 2020)
      AND sales.promo_id = 1
      AND sales.channel_id = 1
    GROUP BY times.calendar_year, times.calendar_month_number
),
growth_rate AS (
    SELECT 
        CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN calendar_year = 2020 THEN usd_sales ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
        NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN calendar_year = 2019 THEN usd_sales ELSE 0 END), 0) AS growth_factor
    FROM monthly_sales_2019_2020
),
projected_2021_monthly AS (
    SELECT 
        2021 AS calendar_year,
        ms.calendar_month_number,
        ms.usd_sales * gr.growth_factor AS projected_usd_sales
    FROM monthly_sales_2019_2020 ms
    CROSS JOIN growth_rate gr
    WHERE ms.calendar_year = 2020
),
monthly_averages AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_month_number,
        AVG(projected_usd_sales) AS avg_monthly_projected_sales
    FROM projected_2021_monthly
    GROUP BY calendar_month_number
),
median_calc AS (
    SELECT 
        avg_monthly_projected_sales,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY avg_monthly_projected_sales) AS rn,
        COUNT(*) OVER () AS cnt
    FROM monthly_averages
)
SELECT 
    AVG(avg_monthly_projected_sales) AS median
FROM median_calc
WHERE rn IN ((cnt + 1) / 2, (cnt + 2) / 2);

WITH monthly_sales_2019_2020 AS (
    SELECT 
        times.calendar_year,
        times.calendar_month_number,
        SUM(sales.amount_sold) AS total_sales
    FROM sales
    JOIN times ON sales.time_id = times.time_id
    JOIN customers ON sales.cust_id = customers.cust_id
    JOIN countries ON customers.country_id = countries.country_id
    WHERE countries.country_name = 'France'
      AND times.calendar_year IN (2019, 2020)
      AND sales.promo_id = 1
      AND sales.channel_id = 1
    GROUP BY times.calendar_year, times.calendar_month_number
),
growth_rate AS (
    SELECT 
        AVG(CASE WHEN calendar_year = 2020 THEN total_sales END) / 
        NULLIF(AVG(CASE WHEN calendar_year = 2019 THEN total_sales END), 0) AS growth_factor
    FROM monthly_sales_2019_2020
),
projected_2021_monthly AS (
    SELECT 
        m.calendar_month_number,
        m.total_sales * g.growth_factor AS projected_sales,
        c.to_us
    FROM monthly_sales_2019_2020 m
    CROSS JOIN growth_rate g
    JOIN currency c ON c.country = 'France' 
                    AND c.year = 2021 
                    AND c.month = m.calendar_month_number
    WHERE m.calendar_year = 2020
),
monthly_avg_usd AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_month_number,
        AVG(projected_sales * to_us) AS avg_monthly_sales_usd
    FROM projected_2021_monthly
    GROUP BY calendar_month_number
),
ordered_avgs AS (
    SELECT 
        avg_monthly_sales_usd,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY avg_monthly_sales_usd) AS rn,
        COUNT(*) OVER () AS cnt
    FROM monthly_avg_usd
)
SELECT 
    AVG(avg_monthly_sales_usd) AS median
FROM ordered_avgs
WHERE rn IN ((cnt + 1) / 2, (cnt + 2) / 2);

WITH monthly_sales_2019_2020 AS (
    SELECT 
        s.time_id,
        t.calendar_year,
        t.calendar_month_number,
        c.country_name,
        SUM(s.amount_sold) AS total_sales_local
    FROM sales s
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    JOIN customers cu ON s.cust_id = cu.cust_id
    JOIN countries c ON cu.country_id = c.country_id
    WHERE t.calendar_year IN (2019, 2020)
      AND c.country_name = 'France'
      AND s.promo_id = 1
      AND s.channel_id = 1
    GROUP BY s.time_id, t.calendar_year, t.calendar_month_number, c.country_name
),
monthly_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_month_number,
        AVG(total_sales_local) AS avg_sales_local
    FROM monthly_sales_2019_2020
    GROUP BY calendar_month_number
),
growth_factor AS (
    SELECT 
        AVG(CASE WHEN calendar_year = 2020 THEN total_sales_local END) / 
        NULLIF(AVG(CASE WHEN calendar_year = 2019 THEN total_sales_local END), 0) AS growth_rate
    FROM monthly_sales_2019_2020
),
projected_2021 AS (
    SELECT 
        ma.calendar_month_number,
        ma.avg_sales_local * gf.growth_rate AS projected_sales_local
    FROM monthly_avg ma
    CROSS JOIN growth_factor gf
),
converted_to_usd AS (
    SELECT 
        p.calendar_month_number,
        p.projected_sales_local * cur.to_us AS projected_sales_usd
    FROM projected_2021 p
    JOIN currency cur ON p.calendar_month_number = cur.month AND cur.country = 'France' AND cur.year = 2021
),
monthly_averages AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_month_number,
        AVG(projected_sales_usd) AS avg_monthly_usd
    FROM converted_to_usd
    GROUP BY calendar_month_number
),
ordered_averages AS (
    SELECT 
        avg_monthly_usd,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY avg_monthly_usd) AS rn,
        COUNT(*) OVER () AS cnt
    FROM monthly_averages
)
SELECT 
    AVG(avg_monthly_usd) AS median
FROM ordered_averages
WHERE rn IN ((cnt + 1) / 2, (cnt + 2) / 2);

WITH monthly_sales_2019_2020 AS (
    SELECT 
        s.time_id,
        t.calendar_year,
        t.calendar_month_number,
        SUM(s.amount_sold) AS total_sales
    FROM sales s
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN countries co ON c.country_id = co.country_id
    WHERE co.country_name = 'France'
      AND t.calendar_year IN (2019, 2020)
      AND s.promo_id = 1
      AND s.channel_id = 1
    GROUP BY s.time_id, t.calendar_year, t.calendar_month_number
),
monthly_avg_2019 AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_month_number,
        AVG(total_sales) AS avg_sales_2019
    FROM monthly_sales_2019_2020
    WHERE calendar_year = 2019
    GROUP BY calendar_month_number
),
monthly_avg_2020 AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_month_number,
        AVG(total_sales) AS avg_sales_2020
    FROM monthly_sales_2019_2020
    WHERE calendar_year = 2020
    GROUP BY calendar_month_number
),
growth_rates AS (
    SELECT 
        a.calendar_month_number,
        CASE 
            WHEN a.avg_sales_2019 = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE b.avg_sales_2020 / a.avg_sales_2019
        END AS growth_rate
    FROM monthly_avg_2019 a
    JOIN monthly_avg_2020 b ON a.calendar_month_number = b.calendar_month_number
),
projected_2021_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        m.calendar_month_number,
        m.total_sales * g.growth_rate AS projected_sales,
        c.to_us
    FROM monthly_sales_2019_2020 m
    JOIN growth_rates g ON m.calendar_month_number = g.calendar_month_number
    JOIN currency c ON c.country = 'France' 
                     AND c.year = 2021 
                     AND c.month = m.calendar_month_number
    WHERE m.calendar_year = 2020
),
projected_2021_usd AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_month_number,
        projected_sales * to_us AS projected_sales_usd
    FROM projected_2021_sales
),
monthly_averages AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_month_number,
        AVG(projected_sales_usd) AS avg_monthly_projected_usd
    FROM projected_2021_usd
    GROUP BY calendar_month_number
),
ordered_averages AS (
    SELECT 
        avg_monthly_projected_usd,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY avg_monthly_projected_usd) AS rn,
        COUNT(*) OVER () AS cnt
    FROM monthly_averages
)
SELECT 
    AVG(avg_monthly_projected_usd) AS median
FROM ordered_averages
WHERE rn IN ((cnt + 1) / 2, (cnt + 2) / 2);

WITH monthly_sales_2019_2020 AS (
    SELECT 
        s.time_id,
        t.calendar_year,
        t.calendar_month_number,
        SUM(s.amount_sold) AS total_sales_local
    FROM sales s
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN countries co ON c.country_id = co.country_id
    WHERE co.country_name = 'France'
      AND t.calendar_year IN (2019, 2020)
      AND s.promo_id = 1
      AND s.channel_id = 1
    GROUP BY s.time_id, t.calendar_year, t.calendar_month_number
),
annual_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_year,
        SUM(total_sales_local) AS annual_sales_local
    FROM monthly_sales_2019_2020
    GROUP BY calendar_year
),
growth_rate AS (
    SELECT 
        (SELECT annual_sales_local FROM annual_totals WHERE calendar_year = 2020) /
        (SELECT annual_sales_local FROM annual_totals WHERE calendar_year = 2019) AS growth_factor
),
monthly_with_currency AS (
    SELECT 
        m.time_id,
        m.calendar_year,
        m.calendar_month_number,
        m.total_sales_local,
        c.to_us
    FROM monthly_sales_2019_2020 m
    JOIN currency c 
        ON m.calendar_year = c.year 
        AND m.calendar_month_number = c.month 
        AND 'France' = c.country
),
projected_2021 AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_month_number,
        SUM(total_sales_local * (SELECT growth_factor FROM growth_rate) * to_us) AS projected_sales_usd
    FROM monthly_with_currency
    WHERE calendar_year = 2020
    GROUP BY calendar_month_number
),
monthly_averages AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_month_number,
        AVG(projected_sales_usd) AS avg_monthly_projected_usd
    FROM projected_2021
    GROUP BY calendar_month_number
),
ordered_averages AS (
    SELECT 
        avg_monthly_projected_usd,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY avg_monthly_projected_usd) AS rn,
        COUNT(*) OVER () AS cnt
    FROM monthly_averages
)
SELECT 
    AVG(avg_monthly_projected_usd) AS median
FROM ordered_averages
WHERE rn IN ((cnt + 1) / 2, (cnt + 2) / 2);

WITH monthly_sales_2019_2020 AS (
    SELECT 
        s.time_id,
        t.calendar_year,
        t.calendar_month_number,
        SUM(s.amount_sold) AS total_sales_local
    FROM sales s
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN countries co ON c.country_id = co.country_id
    WHERE co.country_name = 'France'
      AND t.calendar_year IN (2019, 2020)
      AND s.promo_id = 1
      AND s.channel_id = 1
    GROUP BY s.time_id, t.calendar_year, t.calendar_month_number
),
annual_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_year,
        SUM(total_sales_local) AS annual_sales_local
    FROM monthly_sales_2019_2020
    GROUP BY calendar_year
),
growth_rate AS (
    SELECT 
        (SELECT annual_sales_local FROM annual_totals WHERE calendar_year = 2020) /
        (SELECT annual_sales_local FROM annual_totals WHERE calendar_year = 2019) AS growth_factor
),
monthly_with_currency AS (
    SELECT 
        m.time_id,
        m.calendar_year,
        m.calendar_month_number,
        m.total_sales_local,
        c.to_us
    FROM monthly_sales_2019_2020 m
    JOIN currency c 
        ON m.calendar_year = c.year 
        AND m.calendar_month_number = c.month 
        AND 'France' = c.country
),
projected_2021 AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_month_number,
        SUM(total_sales_local * (SELECT growth_factor FROM growth_rate) * to_us) AS projected_sales_usd
    FROM monthly_with_currency
    WHERE calendar_year = 2020
    GROUP BY calendar_month_number
),
monthly_averages AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_month_number,
        AVG(projected_sales_usd) AS avg_monthly_projected_usd
    FROM projected_2021
    GROUP BY calendar_month_number
),
ordered_averages AS (
    SELECT 
        avg_monthly_projected_usd,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY avg_monthly_projected_usd) AS rn,
        COUNT(*) OVER () AS cnt
    FROM monthly_averages
)
SELECT 
    AVG(avg_monthly_projected_usd) AS median
FROM ordered_averages
WHERE rn IN ((cnt + 1) / 2, (cnt + 2) / 2);
